name: mementol
description: Mementol — memory medication for Claude Code; a daily dose so Claude doesn't forget. Scans your CLAUDE.md / MEMORY.md index files, follows their markdown and @import links to topic files (recursively), and injects those files' contents into every prompt — so your deep-dive memory is always in context, not just the lean index. (Cavinton for the context window.) Works on any project, no config.

memory_loader_mode.title: Injection mode
memory_loader_mode.description: When/what memory to inject: 'always' (everything, every prompt - most reliable, survives compaction), 'session' (once per session - cheapest), or 'relevant' (only topic files matching the prompt). Defaults to 'always'.
